title: abutilon paludosum
intro: Abutilon paludosum, also known as swamp cottonwood or desert cottonwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Native American and Mexican cultures, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Abutilon paludosum include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a digestive aid and to reduce swelling. Herbal preparations of Abutilon paludosum are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
